concerns.text: T024 validates algorithm implementation against KnotInfo for core invariants in Phase 1, but FR-003 explicitly states algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants (Phase 2+), not tabulated core invariants (crossing number, braid index are tabulated from Knot Atlas per SC-008).

T025 logs algorithm validation results in Phase 1, but FR-003 and SC-010 explicitly state algorithm validation against KnotInfo applies only to additional invariants (Phase 2+), not core invariants which are tabulated.

T038 creates 'combined complexity metric visualization' which contradicts FR-005's explicit statement: 'Analysis focuses on crossing number and braid index as separate predictors, not composite measures.'

T034 computes Spearman and Pearson correlations but does not specify which is primary, violating FR-006's mandate: 'Spearman correlation primary, Pearson correlation supplementary for discrete integer-valued invariants.'

T052 generates logs in docs/reproducibility/logs.md but FR-007 requires logs to capture structured format (timestamp, operation, input_file, output_file, parameters, status, duration_ms)—task description does not mandate this format.

T052 and T053 document logs and random seeds in docs/reproducibility/ but Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned in code/ (implementation action), and Principle III requires checksums recorded under data/—tasks conflate documentation location with actual storage location.

T028 mentions 'implement validation script' for tie-breaking rules but SC-007 requires a validation script that 'returns exit code 0 on success'—task does not specify this exit code requirement, dropping a measurable acceptance criterion.

T020 references FR-003 for precision validation but FR-003 defers additional invariant computation and validation to Phase 2+, creating unclear scope boundaries for Phase 1 precision validation tasks.
